message.content: @startuml skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam sequence { LifeLineBorderColor #666666 LifeLineBorderThickness 1 LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent ParticipantBorderThickness 0 ParticipantBackgroundColor transparent ActorBorderColor #000000 ActorBackgroundColor transparent ArrowColor #000000 ArrowThickness 1 MessageAlign left } hide footbox actor Time as Time participant tradecenter as tradecenter participant wms as wms participant "合作商仓储系统" as PartnerWMS participant Aftership as Aftership Time ->> wms : [030] 定时推送运单 wms <-- PartnerWMS : [010] 回传发货信息imei运单号等 wms <-- wms : [020] 生成运单信息 wms ->> Aftership : [040] 推送运单至aftership wms <-- Aftership : [050] 推送路由轨迹信息 wms <-- wms : [060] 轨迹处理和封装 wms <-- wms : [070] 记录运单信息更新状态 alt [路由最终状态] wms ->> tradecenter : [080] 通知订单发货单的路由状态 else [非最终状态] end @enduml
